---
title: "AFLM Tips"
description: "Predicted results based on ELO ratings for upcoming Men's AFL games."
execute:
  freeze: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
```

```{r prep, include=FALSE}
library(reactable)
library(htmltools) 
library(tidyverse) 

data_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jimmyday12/plussixoneblog/main/data_files/processed-data/"

current_season <- 2026

# Load predictions history and results
predictions_history <- read_csv(
  paste0(data_url, "AFLM_predictions_history_", current_season, ".csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(Time         = as.character(Time),
         Predicted_At = as.character(Predicted_At))

results <- read_csv(paste0(data_url, "AFLM_results.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Actual margins for completed games
actuals <- results %>%
  filter(Season == current_season) %>%
  mutate(Margin = Home.Points - Away.Points) %>%
  select(Game, Margin)

completed_games <- actuals$Game
latest_predicted_round <- max(predictions_history$Predicted_Round)
all_rounds <- sort(unique(predictions_history$Round.Number))

# For each round, pick the right prediction snapshot:
#   - Complete rounds:      prediction made just before that round (Predicted_Round == Round - 1)
#   - Current/future rounds: latest snapshot
#   - Fall back to earlier snapshots for games missing from the selected snapshot
predictions_all <- map_dfr(all_rounds, function(rnd) {
  all_round_games <- predictions_history %>%
    filter(Round.Number == rnd) %>%
    pull(Game) %>%
    unique()

  is_complete <- all(all_round_games %in% completed_games)

  if (is_complete) {
    snap <- predictions_history %>%
      filter(Predicted_Round < rnd) %>%
      pull(Predicted_Round) %>%
      max(na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.infinite(snap)) snap <- min(predictions_history$Predicted_Round)
    round_data <- predictions_history %>%
      filter(Round.Number == rnd, Predicted_Round == snap)
  } else {
    round_data <- predictions_history %>%
      filter(Round.Number == rnd, Predicted_Round == latest_predicted_round)
  }

  # Fall back to earlier snapshots for games missing from the selected snapshot
  missing_games <- setdiff(all_round_games, round_data$Game)
  if (length(missing_games) > 0) {
    fallback <- predictions_history %>%
      filter(Game %in% missing_games) %>%
      group_by(Game) %>%
      filter(Predicted_Round == max(Predicted_Round)) %>%
      ungroup()
    round_data <- bind_rows(round_data, fallback)
  }

  round_data
}) %>%
  select(-any_of("Margin")) %>%        # drop NA Margin from history
  left_join(actuals, by = "Game") %>%  # join actual margins cleanly
  mutate(
    Date = as.character(Date),
    Time = as.character(Time)
  )

if (!"Time" %in% names(predictions_all)) predictions_all$Time <- NA
if (!"Margin" %in% names(predictions_all)) predictions_all$Margin <- NA_real_

# Tip correct: predicted winner matches actual winner
# Margin diff: actual - predicted (from home team perspective)
predictions_all <- predictions_all %>%
  mutate(
    Tip.Correct = case_when(
      is.na(Margin)              ~ NA,
      Prediction > 0 & Margin > 0 ~ TRUE,
      Prediction < 0 & Margin < 0 ~ TRUE,
      Prediction == 0 | Margin == 0 ~ NA,
      TRUE                         ~ FALSE
    ),
    Margin.Diff = ifelse(!is.na(Margin), Margin - round(Prediction), NA_real_)
  )

# Add Opening Round (Round 0) from results if not already in predictions
if (!0 %in% all_rounds) {
  opening_round <- results %>%
    filter(Season == current_season, Round.Number == 0) %>%
    mutate(
      Margin      = Home.Points - Away.Points,
      Prediction  = NA_real_,
      Probability = NA_real_,
      Tip.Correct = NA,
      Margin.Diff = NA_real_,
      Time        = NA_character_,
      Date        = as.character(Date)
    ) %>%
    select(any_of(c("Game", "Season", "Date", "Time", "Round.Number",
                     "Venue", "Home.Team", "Away.Team",
                     "Prediction", "Probability", "Margin",
                     "Tip.Correct", "Margin.Diff")))

  if (nrow(opening_round) > 0) {
    predictions_all <- bind_rows(opening_round, predictions_all)
    all_rounds <- sort(unique(predictions_all$Round.Number))
  }
}

# Default round: earliest round with any missing results
rounds_with_missing <- predictions_all %>%
  filter(is.na(Margin)) %>%
  pull(Round.Number) %>%
  unique()

default_round <- if (length(rounds_with_missing) > 0) {
  min(rounds_with_missing)
} else {
  max(predictions_all$Round.Number)
}

match_cols   <- c("Date", "Time", "Round.Number", "Venue")
team_cols    <- c("Home.Team", "Away.Team")
outcome_cols <- c("Prediction", "Probability", "Margin", "Margin.Diff", "Tip.Correct")
keep_cols    <- c("Game", "Season", match_cols, team_cols, outcome_cols)

# Only keep columns that exist
keep_cols <- keep_cols[keep_cols %in% names(predictions_all)]
predictions_all <- predictions_all[, keep_cols]
```

```{r functions, include=FALSE}
rating_column <- function(maxWidth = 55, class = NULL, ...) {
  colDef(maxWidth = maxWidth, align = "center", class = paste("cell number", class), ...)
}

group_column <- function(class = NULL, ...) {
  colDef(cell = format_pct, maxWidth = 70, align = "center", class = paste("cell number", class), ...)
}

knockout_column <- function(maxWidth = 70, class = NULL, ...) {
  colDef(
    cell = format_pct,
    maxWidth = maxWidth,
    class = paste("cell number", class),
    style = function(value) {
      if (value < 0.01) {
        list(color = "#aaa")
      } else {
        list(color = "#111", background = knockout_pct_color(value))
      }
    },
    ...
  )
}

team_column <- function(minWidth = 200,
                        headerStyle = list(fontWeight = 700),
                        align = "left", ...) {
  colDef(
    defaultSortOrder = "asc",
    minWidth         = minWidth,
    headerStyle      = headerStyle,
    align            = align,
    cell = function(value) {
      div(
        class = "team",
        img(class = "flag", alt = paste(value, "flag"),
            src = paste0("../img/", value, ".svg")),
        div(class = "team-name", value)
      )
    },
    ...
  )
}

format_pct <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value))    return("  \u2013 ")
  if (value == 0)      return("  \u2013 ")
  if (value == 1)      return("\u2713")
  if (value < 0.01)    return(" <1%")
  if (value > 0.99)    return(">99%")
  formatC(paste0(round(value * 100), "%"), width = 4)
}

make_color_pal <- function(colors, bias = 1) {
  get_color <- colorRamp(colors, bias = bias)
  function(x) rgb(get_color(x), maxColorValue = 255)
}

off_rating_color   <- make_color_pal(c("#ff2700", "#f8fcf8", "#44ab43"), bias = 1.3)
def_rating_color   <- make_color_pal(c("#ff2700", "#f8fcf8", "#44ab43"), bias = 1)
knockout_pct_color <- def_rating_color
```

```{r table_function, include=FALSE}
create_table <- function(predictions, outcome_cols) {
  reactable(
    predictions,
    pagination      = FALSE,
    width           = "100%",
    defaultSorted   = "Game",
    defaultSortOrder = "asc",
    defaultColGroup = colGroup(headerClass = "group-header"),
    columnGroups    = list(
      colGroup(name = "Result", columns = c("Prediction", "Probability", "Margin", "Margin.Diff", "Tip.Correct"))
    ),
    defaultColDef = colDef(class = "cell", headerClass = "header"),
    columns = list(
      Season       = colDef(show = FALSE),
      Game         = colDef(show = FALSE),
      Day          = colDef(show = FALSE),
      Time         = colDef(show = FALSE),
      Date         = colDef(show = TRUE, maxWidth = 85),
      Round.Number = colDef(show = TRUE, name = "Rnd", maxWidth = 45),
      Venue        = colDef(show = TRUE, maxWidth = 90),
      Home.Team    = team_column(name = "Home", minWidth = 130),
      Away.Team    = team_column(name = "Away", minWidth = 130),
      Prediction   = colDef(show = TRUE, name = "Pred.", maxWidth = 55, align = "center"),
      Probability  = knockout_column(name = "Prob.", show = TRUE, maxWidth = 60),
      Margin       = colDef(
        name     = "Actual",
        show     = TRUE,
        maxWidth = 60,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value) {
          if (is.na(value)) return("–")
          as.character(value)
        }
      ),
      Margin.Diff = colDef(
        name     = "Diff",
        show     = TRUE,
        maxWidth = 60,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value) {
          if (is.na(value)) return("–")
          if (value > 0) paste0("+", value) else as.character(value)
        }
      ),
      Tip.Correct = colDef(
        name     = "Tip",
        show     = TRUE,
        maxWidth = 45,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value) {
          if (is.na(value))   return("–")
          if (isTRUE(value))  return("\u2705")   # ✅
          return("\u274C")                        # ❌
        }
      )
    ),
    rowClass = JS("
      function(rowInfo, state) {
        const firstSorted = state.sorted[0]
        if (firstSorted && firstSorted.id === 'group') {
          const nextRow = state.pageRows[rowInfo.viewIndex + 1]
          if (nextRow && rowInfo.row.group !== nextRow.group) {
            return 'group-last'
          }
        }
      }"),
    showSortIcon = FALSE,
    borderless   = TRUE,
    class        = "standings-table"
  )
}
```

```{r table_display, echo=FALSE}
time <- lubridate::with_tz(Sys.time(), tzone = "Australia/Melbourne") %>%
  format("%I:%M%p")
date <- lubridate::with_tz(Sys.Date(), tzone = "Australia/Melbourne") %>%
  format("%b %d")

# Build round selector options
round_options <- tagList(lapply(all_rounds, function(r) {
  label <- if (r == 0) "Opening Round" else paste0("Round ", r)
  tags$option(
    value    = paste0("round-", r),
    selected = if (r == default_round) "selected" else NULL,
    label
  )
}))

# Build one hidden div per round containing its table
round_tables <- tagList(lapply(all_rounds, function(r) {
  round_data <- predictions_all %>% filter(Round.Number == r)
  tbl        <- create_table(round_data, outcome_cols)
  tags$div(
    id    = paste0("round-", r),
    class = "round-table",
    style = if (r == default_round) "display:block" else "display:none",
    tbl
  )
}))

div(
  class = "standings",
  div(
    style = "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; margin-bottom:12px;",
    paste0("Last updated ", date, " at ", time),
    tags$select(
      id    = "round-selector",
      style = "font-family:Karla,sans-serif; font-size:14px; padding:4px 8px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;",
      round_options
    )
  ),
  round_tables
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
tags$link(
  href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Karla:400,700|Fira+Mono&display=fallback",
  rel  = "stylesheet"
)
```

```{js, echo=FALSE}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const selector = document.getElementById('round-selector');
  if (!selector) return;

  function showRound(roundId) {
    // Hide all round tables
    document.querySelectorAll('.round-table').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = 'none';
    });
    // Show selected
    const target = document.getElementById(roundId);
    if (target) target.style.display = 'block';
  }

  // Show default on load (already set via inline style, but just in case)
  showRound(selector.value);

  selector.addEventListener('change', function() {
    showRound(this.value);
  });
});
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.standings {
  font-family: Karla, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.title {
  margin: 18px 0;
  font-size: 16px;
}
.title h2 {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.standings-table {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.header,
.group-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}
.header {
  border-bottom-color: #555;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.header:hover,
.header[aria-sort="ascending"],
.header[aria-sort="descending"] {
  background-color: #eee;
}
.border-left {
  border-left: 2px solid #555;
}
.cell {
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
}
.group-last .cell {
  box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 #555;
}
.team {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  align-content: left;
}
.record {
  margin-left: 5px;
  color: #999;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.team-name {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.flag {
  margin-right: 8px;
  height: 21px;
  border: 0px solid #f0f0f0;
  align-content: left;
}
.group {
  font-size: 19px;
}
.number {
  font-family: "Fira Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
}
.spi-rating {
  width: 35px;
  height: 35px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #000;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: -2px;
}
.tag {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 2px 12px;
  border-radius: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 12px;
  vertical-align: bottom;
}
.status-up {
  background: rgba(68,171,67,.5);
  color: hsl(116, 30%, 25%);
}
.status-no-change {
  background: hsl(230, 70%, 90%);
  color: hsl(230, 45%, 30%);
}
.status-down {
  background: rgba(255,39,0,.5);
  color: hsl(350, 45%, 30%);
}
```

```{css form-css, echo=FALSE}
.container[role="main"] {
  min-width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 100%;
}
.container {
  min-width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 100%;
}

.standings-table {
  width: 100% !important;
}

.ReactTable {
  width: 100% !important;
}
```
